tagline: News that affects your day now.

designSystem.style: Dark-first civic dashboard with vibrant teal-green accent on deep navy. Card-based information hierarchy with color-coded severity indicators (red/amber/teal). Frosted glass navigation, dynamic island notch, micro-interactions on every interactive element. SVG city map with alert zone overlays. Smooth theme transitions between dark navy and light blue-white modes.

screens: Briefing — Personalized morning digest with severity-coded impact cards, filter chips, expandable detail panels with action CTAs
Map — Interactive SVG city grid with alert zone overlays, tappable pins with popup details, filter by alert type, legend
Actions — Recommended next steps with completion tracking, progress bar, toggle-to-complete micro-interaction
Community — Expandable context articles with vote/comment counts, category badges, full background explanations
Settings — Profile, dark/light theme toggle, location zones, notification preferences with live toggles, trusted sources
